name: QuerySnapshot
description: Expiry-bound derived cache that freezes actuals projection and totals across CLI processes.
schema_def: - id: random opaque 256-bit token hash, primary key
- currencyCode and exact full-set totals: netAccountMovementMinor, externalSpendMinor, budgetActualMinor
- complete immutable result projection required by later pages
Constraints: later page supplies cursor only; fixed effectiveDate DESC then transactionId DESC order; excluded from Durable Ledger State, backups, and restore; opportunistic expiry cleanup.
